content: Email notification preference pitfalls: (1) Failing to implement RFC 8058 one-click unsubscribe (List-Unsubscribe-Post header) — required by Gmail/Yahoo for bulk senders since Feb 2024; (2) Not honoring unsubscribe within 48 hours — violates CAN-SPAM; (3) Resend does NOT manage contact lists for transactional emails — you must track opt-outs in your own DB; (4) Cross-system sync failures when email status doesn't propagate to application DB; (5) Poor UX — single global unsubscribe vs per-category preferences creates friction or over-silencing; (6) Not testing the full unsubscribe path in staging.
